title: Pillagers of War
description: It just about pillagers, really, just really
body:
The Pillagers of War Mod adds a thrilling new dimension called the Hardwood Forest, filled with custom trees, grass, and dirt blocks. This dimension is swarming with pillager-like mobs, making it a high-risk area for adventurous players. 

Players must defeat all Vanila bosses and the new Hardwood boss — which is immune to everything except fire, TNT, and explosion potions — to unlock a portal to progress further. 

The mod also introduces unique items like the Pillager Hammer, new wood types, and explosive potions that deal massive area damage on impact. Perfect for players looking for a challenging boss fight and exploration adventure!
